recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: Adam
recommendations.overview: Adam, a lonely man with Asperger's Syndrome, develops a relationship with his upstairs neighbor, Beth.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: The Little Rascals
recommendations.overview: When nine-year-old Alfalfa falls for Darla, his "He-Man-Woman-Hating" friends attempt to sabotage their relationship.

recommendations.title: Bao
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese mother suffering from empty nest syndrome gets another chance at motherhood when one of her dumplings springs to life as a lively, giggly dumpling boy.

recommendations.title: Front of the Class
recommendations.overview: A boy with Tourette's syndrome overcomes criticism and discrimination to achieve his dream of becoming a teacher.

recommendations.title: Kumbalangi Nights
recommendations.overview: Four brothers living in the fishing hamlet of Kumbalangi share a love-hate relationship with each other. Their relationship progresses when Saji, Boney and Franky decide to help Bobby stand by his love.

recommendations.title: The Peanut Butter Falcon
recommendations.overview: A down-on-his-luck crab fisherman embarks on a journey to get a young man with Down syndrome to a professional wrestling school in rural North Carolina and away from the retirement home where he’s lived for the past two and a half years.

recommendations.title: Begin Again
recommendations.overview: Gretta, a budding songwriter, finds herself alone after her boyfriend Dave ditches her. Her life gains purpose when Dan, a record label executive, notices her talent.
